your relationship with scara was a complicated dance between adversaries and lovers.

you feigned hatred for each other, but the truth painted a different picture. words of "hate" and antagonisms slipped between your lips, but your body betrayed you, responding to his touch with an insatiable need, even when your pride insisted you despised him.
